pageContext.name: Jaga
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Super 7 present the ULTIMATES! Wave 3 Jaga Action Figure!  The wise ThunderCat mentor stands at 7' tall and is fully articulated. The beautifully painted figure comes with a variety of interchangeable parts and accessories, perfect for any ThunderCats fan.  Don't miss your chance to add this Ultimates Figure to your collection today!
